query:
INSERT INTO public.configuration (
                key,
                value,
                updated_at,
                created_at
              )
              SELECT * FROM UNNEST(
                $1::character varying[],
                $2::jsonb[],
                $3::timestamptz[],
                $4::timestamptz[]
              )
              ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET
                value = EXCLUDED.value,
                updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at;
